title: calostephane divaricata
intro: Calostephane divaricata, also known as the bushy calostephane, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Calostephane divaricata include relief from digestive issues, wound healing, and skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Calostephane divaricata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent such as ethanol.
